conversations.greeting: Welcome to the Adventurers Guild. We have work for brave souls and even braver companions.

nodes.reply: Here are our current contracts.

nodes.text: Tell me about the party system.
nodes.reply: Up to three companions may join you. They fight at your side and will even take a mortal blow to keep you standing. Recruit them at local pubs.

nodes.text: I want to join the guild.
nodes.reply: Excellent! You are now a member of the Adventurers Guild.
May your party be strong and your enemies weak.

conversations.greeting: Blessings upon you, traveler. I have potions to aid you on your journey.

nodes.reply: Take what you need. The road ahead is perilous.
Rest here by the fire and you will recover.
Safe travels, friend.

conversations.greeting: Ah, a visitor! My scrolls are among the finest in the realm.

nodes.reply: Scrolls are worn like rings and have limited charges. Use them wisely.
Equip them in a ring slot. Each use consumes a charge. When the last charge fades, the scroll crumbles to dust.
May your magic never fail at a crucial moment.

conversations.greeting: Need a recall scroll? I keep them in stock for registered guild members.

nodes.reply: These scrolls will whisk you straight back to the guild hall.
Safe adventures!

conversations.greeting: (You read the inscription on the trophy case...)

nodes.reply: "In honour of Aldric Ironfist and his companions, who stood fast against the Goblin Kings horde at Three Fords Bridge, and saved seventeen lives. Their names are legend."

conversations.greeting: Aldric the Fighter looks up from their drink. Looking for a travel companion?

nodes.reply: Aye, I have been waiting for a good excuse to leave this barstool. I will join you.
I would love to, but your party is already full. Come back when you have a spot.
I am a Fighter. The name is Aldric Ironfist. Remember it.
Understood. I will head back to The Rusty Flagon. Stay safe out there.
Buy me a drink next time.

Understood. I will head back to The Quiet Quill. Stay safe out there.
Buy me a drink next time.

conversations.greeting: Welcome to the Fighters Guild. We train the finest combat practitioners in the realm.

nodes.text: I want to join the guild.
nodes.reply: A wise choice. You may also be a member of the Adventurers Guild, but not another specialty guild simultaneously.

nodes.text: I want to leave the guild.
nodes.reply: You may leave. Your rank is retained, but benefits are halved until you return.
Our trainers can advance your combat skills. Each rank unlocks new capabilities.
The guild is always here should you return.

conversations.greeting: Ready to train? I can help improve your combat skills.

nodes.reply: Let us begin.
Come back when you are ready to learn.

conversations.greeting: I sell recall scrolls for Fighters Guild members only. Others beware.

nodes.reply: That will be 80 gold. Non-members will be zapped if they use it.
May your travels bring you safely back to us.
